title: Cognology
description: Cognology is a modpack that focuses on automation, technology, and exploration. It is based on the Create Mod and includes a variety of other mods that add new features and mechanics to the game. This is a Minecraft Modpack by the german youtuber gg265.
body:
# **Cognology**

Immerse yourself in the world of automation, technology and exploration with Cognology, a modpack for Minecraft based on the Create mod.

Design complex automated systems and discover innovative technologies in this challenging and rewarding gaming experience.

Cognology offers:

Unlimited automation possibilities: Create complex factories, efficient farms and sophisticated transport systems with the Create mod and its extensions.
Advanced Technological Systems: Immerse yourself in the world of energy production, pipelines, storage and much more with the Create Mod.
Creative freedom: Design your world the way you want with endless building options, decoration options and customization tools.
Collaborative experience: Join forces with friends, form teams and work together on ambitious projects in multiplayer mode.
Cognology is aimed at experienced Minecraft players who:

- Love challenges and want to put your problem-solving skills to the test.
- Are fascinated by the elegance of complex automated systems.
- Sharing the joy of discovering and exploring new worlds of automation.
- Want to express your creativity in unique buildings and inventions.
- With Cognology there are no limits to your imagination.

Start your adventure today and experience the excitement of automation, technology and exploration in a world of possibilities!
